Package org.stellar.sdk

Class Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder

org.stellar.sdk.Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder

Auth.DelegateSignature
public static class Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder
    address(String address)
    The delegate's address (G... account or C... contract).
    Auth.DelegateSignature
    build()
     
    Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder
    nestedDelegates(List<Auth.DelegateSignature> nestedDelegates)
    Signers this delegate in turn delegates to (recursive), or null for none.
    Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder
    signature(SCVal signature)
    The delegate's signature value, or null for an SCV_VOID placeholder, which you can fill afterwards with Auth.authorizeEntry(SorobanAuthorizationEntry, Signer, Long, Network, String) (passing this address as forAddress) or by editing the entry directly.
    String
    toString()

  • Method Details

    • address

      public Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder address(String address)
      The delegate's address (G... account or C... contract).
      Returns:
      this.

    • signature

      public Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder signature(@Nullable SCVal signature)
      The delegate's signature value, or null for an SCV_VOID placeholder, which you can fill afterwards with Auth.authorizeEntry(SorobanAuthorizationEntry, Signer, Long, Network, String) (passing this address as forAddress) or by editing the entry directly.
      Returns:
      this.

    • nestedDelegates

      public Auth.DelegateSignature.DelegateSignatureBuilder nestedDelegates(@Nullable List<Auth.DelegateSignature> nestedDelegates)
      Signers this delegate in turn delegates to (recursive), or null for none.
      Returns:
      this.
